title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · State Clinic: Critical Path
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops critical path increment in a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify serial dependencies and safe opportunities for parallel work.
Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
